settings.pf_4d680adb_value:
Instant Upgrade

If an affiliate reaches a higher GMV tier in a given month, the commission rate automatically upgrades on the 1st of the following month.

Two-Month Buffer Down

If monthly GMV falls below the current tier requirement, the commission will only drop one tier in the following month, even if performance falls multiple tiers.

If the affiliate remains below the required GMV for two consecutive months, the commission will adjust to the actual tier based on GMV.

settings.pf_906e18c0_value:
Standard

All affiliates are placed in this category by default, including coupon sites, deal platforms, cashback sites, and general affiliate traffic.

Premium Content

Content partners such as review sites, blogs, and media publishers may qualify for higher commission rates. The Della team reviews partners and manually upgrades eligible accounts.
settings.pf_0a796d22_value:
We want affiliates to grow with us in a stable and fair way. To maintain high-quality traffic, we require all affiliates to follow the rules below when running paid search campaigns.

What We Don’t Allow
Bidding on our brand name “Della” or any close variations
Using our brand name in combination with generic keywords in search advertising on any platform, including Google Ads, Microsoft Ads, and other similar networks

Any violation of this policy may result in the withholding of related commissions.
